name: Alien Vore World
description: After a few hundred years humanity has made contact with aliens however these aliens aren't as nice as humanity hoped. All of these aliens are quite voracious and humanity is the perfect sized meal to fill them up. All of the aliens have taken over and captured humanity dividing humans into 3 subsects. The two aliens that have invaded are Greegoles and the Greys.
creator: Anderson_Von_Hellsing
